steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student claims all volcanoes in Ecuador are shield volcanoes. To weaken this, we need table data showing at least one Ecuadoran volcano is not a shield volcano.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Chacana and Chimborazo are both shield volcanoes.': The table shows Chacana is a caldera and Chimborazo is a stratovolcano — factually incorrect per the table. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Different volcano types have different years of last eruption.': Concerns eruption dates, not volcano type — irrelevant to the claim. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Fernandina is the only shield volcano among the four Ecuadoran volcanoes shown in the table.': Directly establishes that three of the four volcanoes are not shield volcanoes, contradicting the claim that all are. ✓
  • Choice D — 'None of the four Ecuadoran volcanoes shown in the table are shield volcanoes.': The table shows Fernandina is a shield volcano — factually incorrect per the table. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
